title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: South Korea's H2 2026 custody framework for traditional financial institutions, Australia's dual-track Travel Rule enforcement and stablecoin payment licensing, and the Philippines' ongoing VASP registration deadlines create a 90-day window where 200+ institutions across Northeast Asia, Southeast Asia, and Oceania need compliant transaction monitoring and custody infrastructure operational before Q4 2026.
